title: Plus One
description:
You are given a large integer represented as an array of digits `digits`,
most significant digit first. Increment the integer by one and return the
resulting array of digits.
constraints: No leading zeros (except the number 0 itself).

solutions.summary: Add one to the last digit and propagate any carry leftward.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature, returning the digits unchanged.

steps.title: Walk digits from the right
steps.explanation: Copy the digits and scan from the least significant end.

steps.title: Increment a digit below 9
steps.explanation: If the digit is less than 9, bump it and we are done — no carry.

steps.title: Turn a 9 into 0 and carry
steps.explanation: A 9 becomes 0 and the carry continues to the next digit left.

steps.title: Handle an all-nines carry-out
steps.explanation: If every digit was 9, prepend a leading 1 (e.g. 99 → 100).
